prestazioni: APR Stage 3+ turbocharger upgrade for the CAEB 3.0T V6 engine, featuring a Garrett GTX3582R turbo with billet compressor wheel, 0.82 A/R turbine housing, and upgraded 4.0L intercooler core with 50% increased flow capacity, supporting 550+ HP on 93 octane fuel with APR's proprietary ECU calibration (requires APR fuel pump and high-flow injectors)

034 Motorsport Motorsport Engine Mount Inserts (Part #034-101-101) paired with Vibratechnics solid transmission mounts (Part #AUDMT01) to eliminate CAEB 3.0T drivetrain slop under aggressive launches, combined with a Sachs Performance dual-mass flywheel (Part #3000951001) for faster rev matching

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers (Part #10280001) with 3-way adjustable damping, 8-position rebound adjustment, and Audi S5 B8-specific spring rates (Front: 12 kg/mm, Rear: 14 kg/mm), paired with H&R 20mm front and 15mm rear anti-roll bars (Part #54660-2) to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering on Nürburgring-style tracks
estetica: Rocket Bunny V2 widebody kit (Part #RB-AUDI-S5-B8) with carbon fiber front fenders, extended rear quarter panels, and aggressive 30mm rear overfenders, paired with a custom 3M Matte Military Green wrap (Color Code: 3M 1080-M213) for stealth track presence

OEM+ Audi RS5 B8.5 front bumper conversion (Part #8T0071185F) with integrated carbon fiber splitter from Vorsteiner (Part #V-STEINER-000-101) and a custom 3D-printed ABS rear diffuser with integrated exhaust cutouts for dual 3.5" titanium exhaust tips from Remus (Part #0890016)

Rotiform LAS-R 19x10.5 ET25 (Front) and 19x11.5 ET35 (Rear) forged wheels in Satin Black, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (275/30/19 Front, 295/30/19 Rear), paired with Brembo GT 6-piston front (Part #09.9604.75) and 4-piston rear (Part #09.9604.76) big brake kit with 380mm two-piece rotors and yellow calipers
